deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. $199K purchase, $65K rehab, $340K ARV, $42-62K profit. Property analysis template build.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed to Sirhc for branded analysis sheet.

logs.m: Used as basis for building property analysis tool. Numbers pulled from chat session.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing terminated. Chris walking away. Signs picked up. Development interest from Isaac Linares did not move forward. Title defect blocker.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs retrieved. Isaac development interest and title defect did not result in path forward.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make repairs and updates. Plan to relist when ready. Underwater $93-143K. Short sale blocker resolved.
deals.next: None. Relationship intact. Terminated on good terms.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Sellers moving back into property to make updates and repairs before relisting.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Still searching for new construction, no HOA. Zach Schaphorst pre-approved ~$122K. Referral from LRH pop-up.
deals.next: Follow up with Zach on pre-approval status. Confirm new construction search is active.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: Divorce sale. 4.05 acres, 1,809 sqft, 3/2. Payoff $255,578. CMA completed. Recommended list $295,000. Thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578. CMA pulled. Listing presentation with net sheet prepared.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed May 14. Isaac Linares referral. 3/2.5, 1,886 sqft. Sellers relocating to NC, June deadline. Second-look buyers are hot. Roof claim in progress.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back. It is their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled showing to May 30.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres, hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza family at $113,000. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer agent Javier. Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank REO. HouzzPro remodel in progress. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. Listing agreement not yet submitted to bank.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for utility status. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Installed cameras. Electric reconnected. Drywall complete. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days away.

deals.title: Moran - New Construction Buyer
deals.notes: New construction buyer. $50K down, $1K/month payment target. Buyer rep signed May 7. Jimbo rental arrangement backed out May 28. Green Bliss rental no longer active.
deals.next: Confirm buyer rep status. Pull new construction options from multiple builders. Do not lock to one community.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Chris sent $500 to cover time invested. Skyslope listing needs clearing.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale. Cash transaction $152,000. Buyer: military (Sam VanDenheuvel). Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Cleared and funded Apr 26-27.
deals.next: Deliver joy gift basket and rug. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Send thank you to Chelsey Bongiovi at Reliable Title.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien released by Fernando Castillo. Transaction complete.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House. Grief to healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration pending permission.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story on Facebook and Instagram.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Military retirement income + daughters disability checks. Paying $1,700 rent. VA loan eligible, zero down. Motivated, fixing credit. Between jobs currently.
leads.next: Call today. Connect with VA-approved lender. Qualify timeline, budget, target area.

logs.m: Overdue for follow-up. Flag as priority call today.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife (VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info from next site visit. Get wife VA eligibility details. Connect with VA-approved lender.

logs.m: Met at Priority Bank property during dumpster setup. Wife is active military. Natural warm introduction.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation mentioned but details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer profile and fixer requirements.

logs.m: Met on May 11. Details pending on buyer and property type.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helped Brandon get into real estate. His mom (Milagros Stringer) is new construction buyer. Uncle Jimbo rental arrangement backed out. Focus now on mom buyer commission.
leads.next: Confirm mom buyer rep status. Pull new construction options. Confirm builder visit availability.

logs.m: Rental arrangement with Jimbo backed out. Focus shifted to mom buyer opportunity.

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 Utility Activation
priorities.notes: Electric reconnected but new meter install pending. Water service setup pending callback. Both critical for listing readiness.

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric Cooperative (866-632-3532) - get transformer number status
Call East Medina County SUD (830-709-3879) - confirm water service setup

priorities.title: 10023 Mill Path - Second-Look Buyers
priorities.sub: Close second showing and move to offer
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers love the property. Most interested prospect to date. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled showing May 30. June deadline for sellers.

followUps.text: Confirm May 30 showing time with buyer agent
Follow up post-showing on offer intent

priorities.title: Pamela Moore - VA Buyer
priorities.sub: Call today and connect with lender
priorities.notes: Hot VA buyer. $1,700 rent, motivated. Last contact Apr 29 (sick grandkid). Critical to follow up today. Do not let slip again.

followUps.text: Call or text Pamela Moore (872-822-0656) today
Connect with VA-approved lender for pre-approval

priorities.title: Colton Brown - Get Listing Sold
priorities.sub: Get updated payoff and listing agreement signed
priorities.notes: CMA complete. Net sheet prepared. Payoff $255,578. Recommended list $295,000. Thin market but solid comps available. Divorce motivation is tailwind.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender

priorities.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden Land Close
priorities.sub: Confirm EMD received and amendment signed
priorities.notes: Under contract with Espinoza at $113,000. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier. EMD not yet received. Chicago Title escrow open with Alyssa Castillo.
